kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user leaves User ID empty

kw.name: When user clicks on User ID field
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And user leaves User ID empty
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And user clicks Sign In button
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see User ID empty validation
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r2:-form-item-message"][text()='The User ID cannot be empty']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters User ID with less than 5 characters

kw.name: When user enters User ID with less than 5 characters
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see User ID validation for less than 5 characters
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r2:-form-item-message"][text()='Username must be at least 5 characters.']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters User ID with more than 20 characters

kw.name: When user enters User ID with more than 20 characters
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see User ID validation for more than 20 characters
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r2:-form-item-message"][text()='Username must be at most 20 characters.']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters User ID with special characters

kw.name: When user enters User ID with special characters
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see User ID validation for special characters
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r2:-form-item-message"][text()='The User ID must be alphanumeric']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters User ID with spaces

kw.name: When user clicks on User ID field
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And user enters User ID with spaces
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see User ID validation for spaces
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r2:-form-item-message"][text()='The User ID cannot be empty']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user leaves Password empty

kw.name: When user clicks on Password field
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And user clicks Sign In button
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see Password empty validation
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r3:-form-item-message"][text()='The Password cannot be empty']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters Password with less than 8 characters

kw.name: When user enters Password with less than 8 characters
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see Password validation for less than 8 characters
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r3:-form-item-message"][text()='Password must be at least 8 characters.']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters Password with spaces

kw.name: When user clicks on Password field
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And user enters Password with spaces
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see Password validation for spaces
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r2:-form-item-message"][text()='The User ID cannot be empty']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters Password without numbers

kw.name: When user enters Password without numbers
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see Password validation for missing number
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r3:-form-item-message"][text()='Password must contain at least one number.']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters Password without uppercase letters

kw.name: When user enters Password without uppercase letters
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see Password validation for missing uppercase
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r3:-form-item-message"][text()='Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters Password without lowercase letters

kw.name: When user enters Password without lowercase letters
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see Password validation for missing lowercase
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r3:-form-item-message"][text()='Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify the system shows validation text when user enters Password without special characters

kw.name: When user enters Password without special characters
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should see Password validation for missing special character
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//*[@id=":r3:-form-item-message"][text()='Password must contain at least one special character.']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify Owner Sign In Successfully when user inputs correct credentials

kw.name: When user enters Owner User ID
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: When user click on Sign In button and send Owner valid credentials
Get Library Instance
kw.doc: Returns the currently active instance of the specified library.

kw.name: Clear Persistent Storage
kw.msg: Cleared all persistent storage and in-memory buffers
kw.doc: Clear persistent storage file and in-memory storage to avoid getting old cached requests.

kw.name: Start Network Interception
kw.doc: Enable network and performance logging, inject JS hooks, and clear buffers.

kw.name: Clear Intercepted Requests
kw.doc: Clear in-memory buffers and sessionStorage hooks buffer.

kw.name: And user clicks Sign In button
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Clear Persistent Storage
kw.msg: Cleared all persistent storage and in-memory buffers
kw.doc: Clear persistent storage file and in-memory storage to avoid getting old cached requests.

kw.name: Wait For Request
kw.doc: Wait until a request matching endpoint (substring) and optional method appears. Returns request dict with url, method, headers, payload, status, response, timestamp.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.msg:
Set test message to: URL: https://api.panda.ennam.vn/api/user/sign-in/
StatusCode: 201
kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.name: Set Test Message
kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.name: Set Test Message
kw.doc: Sets message for the current test case.

kw.name: Stop Network Interception
kw.doc: Stop listening (does not clear persisted data).

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Then user should see Report menu
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: Verify Sign Out Successfully when user click on Sign Out button in My Account menu

kw.name: When user clicks on My Account avatar

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then user should be redirected to Sign in screen
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

errors.msg: Error in file 'D:\Automation-Testing\Robot-Framework\PandaPay-v2\resources\common\common_keywords.robot' on line 24: The '[Return]' setting is deprecated. Use the 'RETURN' statement instead.
Error in file 'D:\Automation-Testing\Robot-Framework\PandaPay-v2\resources\common\common_keywords.robot' on line 37: The '[Return]' setting is deprecated. Use the 'RETURN' statement instead.
Multiple tests with name 'Verify Sign Out Successfully when user click on Sign Out button in My Account menu' executed in suite 'Sign-In'.
